name: codecut
description: Codex-only Codecut editing workflow for local executor transcription, EditPlan application, verification, and export.

interface.longDescription: Codecut packages a Codex-only editing workflow for operating Codecut through the local executor and codex-bridge CLI. Codecut stays deterministic: it exposes project state, media assets, local executor transcription, EditPlan validation/application, timeline verification, and export. Codex remains the only LLM and Agent layer.
defaultPrompt: For new creative editing intake with missing setup fields, call the open_codecut_workspace MCP tool directly before reading local files, running shell commands, or sending text clarification fallback; discover it with tool_search if needed.

Use $codecut-jianying-editor-framework after intake fields exist to initialize Codecut, open the local preview in the Codex in-app browser, and operate the current Codex-only editing MVP through the local executor and EditPlan workflow.
